segments.text: Sing, barren woman, you who never bore a child; burst into song, shout for joy, you who were never in labor; because more are the children of the desolate woman than of her who has a husband
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Enlarge the place of your tent, stretch your tent curtains wide, do not hold back; lengthen your cords, strengthen your stakes
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For you will spread out to the right and to the left; your descendants will dispossess nations and settle in their desolate cities
Do not be afraid; you will not be put to shame. Do not fear disgrace; you will not be humiliated. You will forget the shame of your youth and remember no more the reproach of your widowhood
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For your Maker is your husband— the Lord Almighty is his name— the Holy One of Israel is your Redeemer; he is called the God of all the earth
The Lord will call you back as if you were a wife deserted and distressed in spirit— a wife who married young, only to be rejected
For a brief moment I abandoned you, but with deep compassion I will bring you back
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: In a surge of anger I hid my face from you for a moment, but with everlasting kindness I will have compassion on you
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: To me this is like the days of Noah, when I swore that the waters of Noah would never again cover the earth. So now I have sworn not to be angry with you, never to rebuke you again
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Though the mountains be shaken and the hills be removed, yet my unfailing love for you will not be shaken nor my covenant of peace be removed
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Afflicted city, lashed by storms and not comforted, I will rebuild you with stones of turquoise, your foundations with lapis lazuli
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will make your battlements of rubies, your gates of sparkling jewels, and all your walls of precious stones
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: All your children will be taught by the Lord, and great will be their peace
In righteousness you will be established: Tyranny will be far from you; you will have nothing to fear. Terror will be far removed; it will not come near you
If anyone does attack you, it will not be my doing; whoever attacks you will surrender to you
See, it is I who created the blacksmith who fans the coals into flame and forges a weapon fit for its work. And it is I who have created the destroyer to wreak havoc
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: No weapon forged against you will prevail, and you will refute every tongue that accuses you. This is the heritage of the servants of the Lord, and this is their vindication from me
segments.speaker: The Lord
